Handoff： - 产物已写入： - `.ypi/tasks/20260707-121400-设计-ypi-studio-subagent-in-process-sdk-子会话一致性改造/brief.md` - `prd.md` - `ui.md` - `design.md` - `implement.md`（含 9 个子任务的 `json ypi-implementation-plan`） - `checks.md` - `handoff.md` - 已保存 implementationPlan 到 `task.json`，并将任务状态 transition 到 `awaiting_approval`，等待用户确认后再实现。 - 未修改生产代码。 - 验证： - 未运行 `npm run lint` / `tsc`，本轮仅规划文档。 - 运行了现有 Studio task helper 脚本解析并保存 plan，确认状态为 `awaiting_approval`、planSubtasks=9。 - 主要设计决策： - 长期使用显式持久化 SDK child session。 - child session header 写 `studioChild` 元数据，`task.json` 仍是状态权威。 - child 默认不注入 Studio tools，避免递归、approval gate 绕过、continuation loop。 - Sidebar 默认隐藏/父级折叠 child sessions，避免污染项目历史。 - 先修 bundled CLI fallback，再通过 `auto/sdk/cli` 分阶段上线 SDK runner。 - 待主会话确认： 1. SDK runner 首版是否按推荐使用 `auto`。 2. child session 是否首版严格只读。 3. 是否接受“先 CLI fallback，再 SDK runner”的实现节奏。

  2. child session 是否首版严格只读。
  3. 是否接受“先 CLI fallback，再 SDK runner”的实现节奏。

### Implementation Complete #### Files Changed - `lib/types.ts` — Added optional `studioChild` contract on `SessionHeader` / `SessionInfo`, plus Studio child runner/status metadata types. - `lib/ypi-studio-types.ts` — Added optional `runner`, `childSessionId`, `childSessionFile`, and `requestAffinity` fields to `YpiStudioTaskSubagentRun`. - `docs/architecture/overview.md` — Documented Studio child session header contract and clarified `parentSession` vs `studioChild.parentSessionId`; `task.json` remains authoritative. - `docs/modules/library.md` — Updated module map/reuse rules for child session metadata and run contract. #### Verification - `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed. #### Notes / Risks - Runtime parsing/persistence of these new optional fields is not implemented in this subtask; later subtasks must update `session-reader`, SDK runner, and task run normalization/projection as planned. - No migration required; all new fields are optional.

### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/types.ts` — Added optional `studioChild` contract on `SessionHeader` / `SessionInfo`, plus Studio child runner/status metadata types.
- `lib/ypi-studio-types.ts` — Added optional `runner`, `childSessionId`, `childSessionFile`, and `requestAffinity` fields to `YpiStudioTaskSubagentRun`.
- `docs/architecture/overview.md` — Documented Studio child session header contract and clarified `parentSession` vs `studioChild.parentSessionId`; `task.json` remains authoritative.
- `docs/modules/library.md` — Updated module map/reuse rules for child session metadata and run contract.

#### Verification

- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.

#### Notes / Risks

- Runtime parsing/persistence of these new optional fields is not implemented in this subtask; later subtasks must update `session-reader`, SDK runner, and task run normalization/projection as planned.
- No migration required; all new fields are optional.

### Implementation Complete #### Files Changed - `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — Updated `resolvePiCli()` to prefer bundled/local `@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/dist/cli.js`, dedupe candidates, and keep `pi` on `PATH` as final fallback. - `docs/operations/troubleshooting.md` — Documented legacy CLI runner bundled resolution behavior and troubleshooting note. #### Verification - `npm run lint` — passed - `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed - Manual resolution check with restricted `PATH` — bundled CLI found at local dependency path #### Notes / Risks - Did not run a real Studio architect child run with global `pi` removed; only verified resolver mechanics and static checks. - No `package.json` changes were needed.

### Implementation Partial / Blocked #### Files Changed - `lib/ypi-studio-subagent-runtime.ts` - Runtime handle now carries `runner`, `childSessionId`, `childSessionFile`. - Runtime updates can patch those fields for SDK/CLI unified projection. - `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` - Split CLI JSON stdout handling into an event-object handler (`handleChildEvent`) so SDK `subscribe()` events can reuse the same progress/transcript semantics. - Propagates runner/child-session metadata through progress payloads, run snapshots, final result, runtime registry, and compact projections. - CLI runs explicitly mark `runner: "cli"`. - `lib/ypi-studio-types.ts` - Transcript refs can now include `runner`, `childSessionId`, `childSessionFile`. - `app/api/studio/tasks/[taskKey]/subagents/[runId]/route.ts` - Run projection returns runner/child-session/request-affinity metadata. - Cancel path now also marks `progress.phase="finished"` and stores `terminationReason`. #### Validation - `npm run lint` — passed…

### Implementation Partial / Blocked

#### Files Changed

- `lib/ypi-studio-subagent-runtime.ts`
  - Runtime handle now carries `runner`, `childSessionId`, `childSessionFile`.
  - Runtime updates can patch those fields for SDK/CLI unified projection.

- `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts`
  - Split CLI JSON stdout handling into an event-object handler (`handleChildEvent`) so SDK `subscribe()` events can reuse the same progress/transcript semantics.
  - Propagates runner/child-session metadata through progress payloads, run snapshots, final result, runtime registry, and compact projections.
  - CLI runs explicitly mark `runner: "cli"`.

- `lib/ypi-studio-types.ts`
  - Transcript refs can now include `runner`, `childSessionId`, `childSessionFile`.

- `app/api/studio/tasks/[taskKey]/subagents/[runId]/route.ts`
  - Run projection returns runner/child-session/request-affinity metadata.
  - Cancel path now also marks `progress.phase="finished"` and stores `terminationReason`.

#### Validation

- `npm run lint` — passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — blocked by pre-existing/current parallel-task error:
  - `lib/ypi-studio-child-guard.ts(84,49): Property 'command' does not exist ...`

#### Notes / Risks

- `lib/ypi-studio-child-session-runner.ts` is absent in the current workspace, so SDK `AgentSession.subscribe()` cannot yet be wired to this mapper here.
- Header terminal-status finalization for SDK child sessions also depends on the missing SDK runner/header patch implementation.
- Current work prepares shared projection/runtime/cancel plumbing and preserves CLI behavior.

### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/ypi-studio-child-guard.ts` — added child-only guard extension:
  - Blocks recursive Studio tools: `ypi_studio_task`, `ypi_studio_subagent`, `ypi_studio_wait`
  - Blocks known subagent/Trellis tools: `subagent`, `trellis_subagent`
  - Blocks Browser Share action tools
  - Blocks `write`/`edit` to `.ypi/tasks/**/task.json`
  - Best-effort blocks bash mutations of `.ypi/tasks/**/task.json`
- `docs/architecture/overview.md` — documented SDK child guard and parent-session authority boundary.
- `docs/modules/library.md` — documented new guard module.

#### Verification

- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed
- `npm run lint` — passed
- `npm run test:studio-dag` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- Current worktree does not contain `lib/ypi-studio-child-session-runner.ts`; the guard factory is ready, but SDK runner must explicitly include `createYpiStudioChildGuardExtension({ workspaceRoot })` in its child `DefaultResourceLoader` for runtime enforcement.
- Bash mutation detection is best-effort by design; it cannot fully sandbox arbitrary scripts.
- Existing approval gates were preserved: implementation subtask claim/start paths still require task status `implementing`.

### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/pi-web-config.ts` — added `studio.subagents.runner` config contract (`auto | sdk | cli`), defaults, normalization, and validation.
- `components/SettingsConfig.tsx` — exposed Studio subagent runner setting in Settings → Studio.

### Implementation Complete #### Files Changed - `lib/ypi-studio-child-session-runner.ts` — added real in-process SDK child runner with persistent child JSONL, `studioChild` header patching, guard extension wiring, SDK event → progress/transcript mapping, abort/finalize, request affinity metadata. - `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — `runner=sdk` now uses SDK runner; `auto` prefers SDK and falls back to CLI only on pre-prompt SDK preflight failure. - `app/api/projects/[projectId]/spaces/[spaceId]/sessions/route.ts` — includes Studio child sessions under visible parent sessions without treating them as root history. - `app/api/agent/[id]/route.ts` — rejects POST to Studio child audit sessions as read-only. - `components/SessionSidebar.tsx` — displays child sessions as nested Studio audit rows with member/status/run labels. - `components/ChatWindow.tsx` — shows child audit banner and disables input for child sessions. - `docs/modules/api.md`, `docs/modules/frontend.md`, `docs/modules/libra…

### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/ypi-studio-child-session-runner.ts` — added real in-process SDK child runner with persistent child JSONL, `studioChild` header patching, guard extension wiring, SDK event → progress/transcript mapping, abort/finalize, request affinity metadata.
- `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — `runner=sdk` now uses SDK runner; `auto` prefers SDK and falls back to CLI only on pre-prompt SDK preflight failure.
- `app/api/projects/[projectId]/spaces/[spaceId]/sessions/route.ts` — includes Studio child sessions under visible parent sessions without treating them as root history.
- `app/api/agent/[id]/route.ts` — rejects POST to Studio child audit sessions as read-only.
- `components/SessionSidebar.tsx` — displays child sessions as nested Studio audit rows with member/status/run labels.
- `components/ChatWindow.tsx` — shows child audit banner and disables input for child sessions.
- `docs/modules/api.md`, `docs/modules/frontend.md`, `docs/modules/library.md` — updated actual behavior.
- `.ypi/tasks/.../handoff.md` — updated handoff artifact.

#### Verification

- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed
- `npm run lint` — passed
- `npm run test:studio-policy` — passed
- `npm run test:studio-dag` — passed; Node experimental loader warning only

#### Remaining Risks

- Real provider/browser smoke test not run in this environment. Need one `runner=sdk` Studio child run to verify header, terminal status, wait/cancel, Sidebar folding, and read-only audit view.
- Bash mutation blocking for `.ypi/tasks/**/task.json` remains best-effort; approval gate/review remain the hard safety path.
